description: Received a fake SMS claiming to be from SBI defence salary account asking to click a link to verify KYC details immediately.
Downloaded a fake SPARSH pension app from a Telegram group link. App requested SMS and contact permissions on install.
Caller impersonated a Colonel from Army Welfare Office and demanded OTP to process pension arrears payment.
Fraudulent transaction of Rs 45,000 from defence salary account after clicking a link in a welfare scheme update email.
Received WhatsApp message from unknown number claiming ECHS card renewal requires OTP verification on a fake portal.
Fake email impersonating SPARSH portal asked to update bank account details via a spoofed login page.
Suspicious APK named CSD_Canteen_App_v2.apk distributed via WhatsApp group was found harvesting credentials.
Received SMS with a link to a fake Sainik welfare fund disbursement portal requesting net banking credentials.
Unknown caller asked for OTP claiming to be from Army canteen helpdesk for a loyalty points redemption offer.
Telegram message from a fake defence welfare officer account offering a special pension bonus requiring personal details.
Suspicious email with Army logo asked to verify email address via a link that redirected to an unknown domain.
Fraudster posed as PCDA (O) representative and convinced victim to share net banking OTP for salary revision processing.
Received fake ECHS hospital appointment confirmation SMS with a link asking for OTP to confirm the booking.
Received a link to download ECHS_Card_Renewal.apk from a third-party website shared in a defence veterans group.
WhatsApp message from a number claiming to be Sainik Board secretary asked for Aadhaar and bank details for welfare scheme enrollment.
